#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {

    static constexpr char GetFirstChar(std::string_view str) { return str[0]; }
    static constexpr char GetLastChar(std::string_view str) { return str[str.length() - 1]; }
    static constexpr int32_t GetLength(std::string_view str) { return static_cast<int32_t>(str.length()); }


    static constexpr std::array<std::string_view, 4> keys = {
        u8"alpha", u8"bravo", u8"charlie", u8"delta"
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {
        int32_t getLength;
        char getFirstChar;
        char getLastChar;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 7))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getFirstChar = GetFirstChar(key);
        if ((getFirstChar > 100))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getLastChar = GetLastChar(key);
        if ((getLastChar > 111))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((((0 & (1ull << static_cast<int32_t>((static_cast<uint32_t>(getLastChar) & 63u)))) & ~(0 - static_cast<uint64_t>((static_cast<uint32_t>(getLastChar) >> 6)))) | ((140883517243392ull & (1ull << static_cast<int32_t>((static_cast<uint32_t>(getLastChar) & 63u)))) & (0 - static_cast<uint64_t>((static_cast<uint32_t>(getLastChar) >> 6))))) == 0))
        {
         return false;
        }


        for (size_t i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            if (keys[i] == key)
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 4;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key_length = 7;
    static constexpr bool has_number = false;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
